Cast-Iron Mace  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 19.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Cast-Iron Mace
Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 19.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Blunt
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1
Lucy Entry By:dra
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 03:26:50
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Average Price: 1pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common

[Comments ]


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Befallen


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Is this true?
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175362813
3 posts
I don't want to question anyone...ok I do want to question the post below that said if you hit 100-120 times with it, it turns into a very nice weapon. I got mine last night, and used it for about 150 or so hits, mostly on green mobs, and it didn't turn.

My question is...is this post true, has anyone else verified this, does it have to be on blue mobs or above?

Fistnoll Wu'sson
20 season Monk
Zebuxorruk
▲ Page top
RE: Is this true?
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 1:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763939769
168 posts
Have given this to my 21st lvl warrior and pounded on the /con Blue Prisoner on the 3rd level of Befallen for at least 3 hours straight (put on auto attack and went to sleep ^_^ )

No change in the mace...I wuz disappointed. But at least my warrior got some 1h blunt skill points.

Khemosaabe "SPAM" Longbow (of Cazic Thule server)
Lvl 51 Ranger and Slayer-of-Bunny-Wabbits
"Bad...bad talking cat!"

# Jul 02 2001 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent

thats all id like ta know...

# Jul 03 2001 at 2:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760164965
Scholar
68 posts
I got one off of a Enslaved Follwer (along with 4 plat, pretty good cash for a slave), and one off of a scarred initiate after she tried to smite me and I made her into a new type of DE pudding.

Sold one to a vendor for 2 plat and put the other in the bank just in case.

Racknar
▲ Page top
Really For
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 11:52 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If you use the weapon and connect with it for about 100-120 times you get a message going across the screen that says ---Your weapon has been broken in--- You get a 9/26 Used Mace 1hb, wt 2.0 all the same classes.. It actually does have a use
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 01 2001 at 11:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Have you all ever stopped to look, its from befallen, no one wants to use it, seems like bronze! and why do you get bronze? to sell, maybe this sells decent to merchants (decent is 2p or so), so don't just post on an item because it won't be of use to you, there are some people not over lvl 30, Not me though!!! almost planes :), oh great, i die and there goes a few levels.
Verant.... no
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 10:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761959792
27 posts
Why the hell would you make a weapon out of cast iron? Cast iron is very brittle, try it, go get a cast iron frying pan or something and then bang it on a tree... the pan will break.I dont know where verant got the idea for cast iron weapons but.... then again its verant.
▲ Page top
RE: Verant.... no
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 11:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361336744
20 posts
Pretty sure they just ran out of names for weapons.
*at Verant HQ*
"Uh, lessee, we've already got all the metals, all sorts of adjectives...what else to use..."
"Hey, Fred, you see the cast-iron fence I'm putting up around my house so angry players won't storm it?"
"That's it!"

Obviously a monk iterm
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 6:41 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749880898
Scholar
29 posts
Just kidding of course, but it did seem for a while there that every item posted people said it should go to the monks. Lets see an ogre might be able to attack with it 4 times without depleting his stamina bar heheh. This has to be a quest item. Non magical, lousy stats, 19 wt. If they think someone will use it, I want to know how i can get in on selling some of what they are using, I need to pay off my mortgage.

I concur with the quest item bit.
